content: GAP #0: Normalizar gameDate -> kickoff_iso antes de time_filter en mlb_day_orchestrator
GAP #1: Requerir AMBOS pitchers confirmados (cambiar OR -> AND) en _confirm_pitchers_statsapi
GAP #2: Implementar fallback a mlb.com cuando StatsAPI no trae pitchers
GAP #4: Integrar IL check en orchestrator (asyncio.gather + scoring_ctx)
GAP #5: Penalizar fragility por IL count >=3 / >=5 en mlb_fragility_score
GAP #6: Agregar PITCHER_NOT_CONFIRMED, MLB_COM_FALLBACK_USED, IL_DEPTH_RISK al signal_catalog y emitirlos
GAP #7/8: Testing agent valida el pipeline MLB completo (45/46 PASS)
